title: TANUVAS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Technical Support II Posts
description: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) has declared the official notification for Project Technical Support II Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc, B.E/ B.Tech can grab this chance and apply for the TANUVAS Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, and salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can apply before the last date of application. If you are looking for ...
